title: The Impersonator
relevance_summary: Social engineering and impersonation of a security researcher to gain trust and exploit vulnerabilities
monitoring_rules: Monitor for suspiciously early reports of exploits; analyze for patterns of consistent insider knowledge; flag for further investigation if a single individual reports multiple exploits with detailed information before others
summary: Nick Franklin, a former Twitter user, was revealed to be a state-sponsored threat actor working for North Korea's Lazarus Group. He impersonated a security researcher to gain trust and exploit vulnerabilities in various protocols.
